articles.title: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B
articles.summary: The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.

articles.title: Lorde says AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
articles.summary: "Increasingly in our world, it gets harder and harder to know what is real," Lorde said onstage.

articles.title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
articles.summary: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."

articles.title: OpenAI pushes back on Apple trade secret lawsuit
articles.summary: OpenAI has issued another statement on the lawsuit, this time suggesting it lacks merit.

articles.title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
articles.summary: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

articles.title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
articles.summary: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software’s official launch this fall.

articles.title: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
articles.summary: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem aware of the responsibility it carries — would appear to be more of the same.

articles.title: The founder of Hinge raised $18M to build a new AI dating service, Overtone
articles.summary: Overtone describes itself as "a voice- and audio-forward service, enabled by AI, that provides highly curated introductions."

articles.title: So Far, 2026 Is A Solid Year For Cybersecurity Startup Funding
articles.summary: The first quarter of 2026 was a more robust period for funding than the second, with privacy and cybersecurity startups pulling in $4.4 billion in seed- through growth-stage financing in Q2. That marked a decline of around 30% from the prior quarter and year-ago levels.

articles.title: Mitsubishi takes over $7.5 billion in U.S. natural gas fields from Aethon, deepening Japanese bet on LNG and the AI boom
articles.summary: Mitsubishi's biggest buy ever is a big best on global gas demand and the AI boom.

articles.title: An SEC email address mix-up is causing confusion and threatening to disrupt its proposal to scrap quarterly reporting requirements
articles.summary: The SEC has received more than 66,000 comment submissions on the controversial rule, and now, claims that there may have been a typo in the email address published in the Federal Register, could cause big headaches.

articles.title: The secrets of an unheralded AI success story
articles.summary: Logistics company C.H. Robinson has seen a 45% productivity gain from deploying AI agents. Its CEO Dave Bozeman explains how he's found ROI from AI.

articles.title: A new FCC proposal could spell the end of the burner phone
articles.summary: Burner phones may be a thing of the past as a new FCC proposal will require carriers to collect a customer's name, address, ID number, and alternate phone.

articles.title: Topgolf’s CEO thinks the sport’s next star could get their start at one of its driving ranges
articles.summary: The former Chuck E. Cheese CEO who clawed the chain out of a $1 billion in debt is bringing family-friendly entertainment to a Topgolf near you.

articles.title: Trump reduces size of two national monuments by 90% in efforts to expand land development
articles.summary: President Trump issued proclamations to remove protections and roll back rules for conservation to open up property development in taxpayer-owned land

articles.title: New experimental Alzheimer’s drug shows potential after study shows slower cognitive decline
articles.summary: A study on Biogen's diranersen found it slowed cognitive decline and has promise in treating Alzheimer's disease, researchers found.

articles.title: U.S.-Russia space crew arrives at the ISS despite bitter space race past
articles.summary: The joint mission comes as broader cooperation stalls and Russia pivots toward China on future space projects.

articles.title: 1Password moves into AI cost management, betting that token spend is the next enterprise budget crisis
articles.summary: 1Password on Tuesday launched AI Spend and Consumption Management, a new capability embedded in its SaaS Manager platform that gives IT and finance teams a unified, real-time view of how their organizati

articles.title: Canva launches Code 2.0, offering AI website building to every user — including free accounts
articles.summary: Canva on Tuesday launched Canva Code 2.0, a major upgrade to its AI-powered coding tool that lets users build interactive websites, apps, and experiences using plain-language prompts — and then edit the re

articles.title: PsiQuantum has a plan to make a massive quantum computer out of light
articles.summary: The machine that could change the world will be housed in a room that looks like a data center crossed with an ice cream factory. articles.title: 36氪首发 | 前非夕科技核心业务合伙人创业，做垂域工业智能体，获数千万元种子轮融资
articles.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，上海追知工程科技有限公司（以下简称“追知工科”）近日完成数千万元种子轮融资，由L2F光源创业者基金、尚融资本、一村资本联合投资。本轮融资将主要用于核心产品研发、团队建设及市场拓展。

追知工科成立于2024年2月，是一家聚焦垂域工业智能体的科技企业，同时也是上海交通大学成果转化企业、上海人工智能研究院战略孵化企业。公司希望通过将人工智能技术引入工业制造场景，提升复杂基石工艺制程环节的自动化和智能化水平，重点解决制造业柔

articles.title: 36氪首发 | 前阿里平头哥半导体高管创业，RISC-V芯片厂商获新一轮融资
articles.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，深圳市智创芯微电子有限公司（简称“智创芯”）完成 Pre-A轮融资。本轮融资由启迪之星创投、深圳开鸿数字产业发展有限公司（简称“深开鸿”）发起的产业基金、珠海正菱集团、以及应广科技等机构共同参与。

本轮融资完成后，智创芯将与深开鸿围绕开源鸿蒙（OpenHarmony）与开源RISC-V的融合展开战略合作，共同推进“双开源”软硬件生态建设，加速相关技术在智能终端等产业场景落地。

articles.title: 36氪首发 | 浙大系桌面CNC团队获商汤国香、首形科技等近亿元天使轮，要用AI技术降低制造门槛
articles.summary:
作者 | 张子怡

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，桌面级CNC（数控机床）企业「奇塑科技」于近期完成近亿元人民币天使轮融资。本轮融资由商汤国香、首形科技、全新世、奇绩创坛共同投资。本轮资金将主要用于桌面级CNC软硬件产品的研发、量产以及后续的市场营销。

在消费级3D打印机和激光雕刻机已完成大众市场教育，并诞生了诸如拓竹、xTool等多个头部企业后，能够实现“从软材到硬材强三维加工”的CNC产品，被视为消费级制造领域的下一片万亿蓝海。
